title: Death Undreaded
content:
Death stands above me, whispering low
I know not what into my ear:
Of his strange language all I know
Is, there is not a word of fear.
meaning:
Walter Savage Landor's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Death Undreaded"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
